flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Loyola University New Orleans rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.5k → $49.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Loyola University New Orleans rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.5k → $49.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Loyola University New Orleans fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Loyola University New Orleans fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (53.9% → 48.0%).
